resultList.dtldesc: Step into spacious luxury with this 4 BHK flat for sale in Strut Arcadia 77, Vaishnodevi Circle, Ahmedabad, designed to be Vaastu compliant. The east-facing home invites morning sunlight and positive vibes into every room. Set in a prime location, it offers both comfort and convenience for your family.Property Specifications Elevated living takes on a new meaning in this expansive 4 BHK apartment, gracefully positioned on the 14th and top floor of a premium high-rise. Spanning a super area of 3825 sq.ft., this unfurnished home offers a blank canvas to craft your dream space in the sky.Thoughtfully laid out, the apartment features four generously sized bedrooms, including three with attached western-style bathrooms and one serviced by a common bathroomperfect for both family living and guest accommodation. A separate living and dining area adds a sense of openness and flow, ideal for entertaining or unwinding after a long day.Step out onto the balcony, which connects seamlessly to the bedroom and living room, offering tranquil views of the main road and a lush garden below. The standard kitchen is paired with a utility area, providing both functionality and convenience for everyday use. The interiors are finished with vitrified tile flooring, giving the home a clean and contemporary feel.Facilities Residents benefit from covered parking, 247 water supply, and 100 power backup, ensuring uninterrupted comfort. The building is secured with round-the-clock security, CCTV surveillance, and two elevators for smooth vertical access.Locality Located near the prestigious Nirma University, this locality is a vibrant and well-connected area that offers exceptional convenience for residents. With reputed schools, hospitals, and supermarkets all just a 2-minute walk away, daily essentials and services are within immediate reachmaking it ideal for families, students, and professionals alike.Public transport is easily accessible with frequent connectivity across the city, while banks and ATMs are close by for hassle-free financial transactions. The presence of a nearby railway station further enhances the areas connectivity, offering smooth travel options for intercity commuters.

resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to the epitome of modern living nestled in the heart of Ahmedabads vibrant landscape. Presenting a rare opportunity to own a slice of luxury in the esteemed Mahadev Platinum, located in the coveted neighborhood of Punitnagar Ghodasar. Property SpecificationsStep into luxury with this meticulously crafted 3 BHK flat boasting a spacious super built-up area of 1905 sqft, nestled on the top floor of a prestigious 5-story building in the esteemed Mahadev Platinum. Oriented to the east, indulge in serene mornings and vibrant sunrises every day. The residence comes semi-furnished, offering a blend of comfort and style with essential furniture including wardrobes, lights, fans, a bed, and fixed furniture thoughtfully provided.Inside, discover three inviting bedrooms, each designed for relaxation and privacy. Two bathrooms are attached to bedrooms, while a third serves as a convenient common facility, all featuring modern Western amenities and equipped with geyser points for added comfort. Step out onto the attached balcony from the drawing room and immerse yourself in the tranquil garden view, creating a serene retreat within the bustling city.The living cum dining area provides a seamless space for entertaining guests or unwinding with family, while a dedicated store room ensures ample storage for your belongings. Culinary enthusiasts will appreciate the sleek modular kitchen, complete with piped gas connection for hassle-free cooking experiences. Adorned with elegant vitrified flooring throughout, this residence exudes sophistication and charm, promising a lifestyle of unparalleled comfort and convenience.FacilitiesEnjoy the convenience of open parking along with continuous water supply sourced from a reliable borewell. Rest assured with 100 power backup, round-the-clock security guard, and surveillance facilitated by CCTV cameras installed throughout the premises. Elevate your living experience with the convenience of a lift, while indulging in the array of amenities including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, outdoor games room, and a meticulously crafted landscape garden with a dedicated kids play area.LocalityBenefit from the proximity to essential amenities with schools and hospitals just 1km away, ensuring convenience and accessibility. Enjoy the convenience of malls, supermarkets, banksATMs, and public transport options nearby, adding to the ease of everyday living.
